codeReview.summary: The current code state still satisfies the beta comment-extension contract. Range findings build GitLab diff discussion positions with line_range start/end metadata, and suggestion blocks remain gated on both patch validity and confidence threshold. The prior degradation-summary regression noted in the earlier review has since been fixed outside the feature commit and no longer blocks this surface.

summary: Reviewed the rerun for beta-comment-extensions against the current tree by checking mission guidance, feature metadata, the prior review, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, go-integration skill, commit 4b21b133 diff, and the live writer/provider code paths. The feature commit still correctly implements multi-line range comment payloads and high-confidence valid suggestion gating, and the later degradation-summary regression previously flagged for this surface has been fixed by persisting degradation summaries onto review-run state consumed by the writer. No remaining feature-scope issues were found.
